subject: Fermi GBM trigger 737105243/240511311 is not a GRB
body:
B. Mailyan (Florida tech) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 737105243/240511311
at 07:27:18.64 UT on 11 May 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity.
For Fermi GBM data and info, please visit the official
Fermi GBM Support Page: https://fermi.gsfc.nasa.gov/ssc/data/access/gbm/"
